Package global.thalion.ttio.importers

Class CramReader

java.lang.Object
global.thalion.ttio.importers.BamReader
global.thalion.ttio.importers.CramReader
public class CramReader extends BamReader
CRAM importer — M88.

Subclass of BamReader that reads CRAM (CRAM Reference- compressed Alignment Map) files via the user-installed samtools binary. The only on-the-wire difference from BAM is that CRAM input requires --reference <fasta> so the reference-compressed sequence bytes can be reconstituted; SAM text parsing downstream is identical.

CRAM is the modern reference-compressed sequencing format used by the 1000 Genomes Project, GA4GH RefGet workflows, and clinical pipelines that need ~50% smaller files than BAM. Per Binding Decision §139 the reference FASTA is a positional constructor argument; no env-var fallback, no RefGet HTTP support in v0.

The samtools binary is a runtime dependency, not a build dependency. Construction succeeds without samtools on PATH; BamReader.toGenomicRun(String, String, String) raises BamReader.SamtoolsNotFoundException when samtools cannot be located at first use (Binding Decision §135 from M87).

Cross-language equivalents: Python ttio.importers.cram.CramReader, Objective-C TTIOCramReader.

(M88)

  • Constructor Details

    • CramReader

      public CramReader(Path path, Path referenceFasta)
      Construct a CramReader.
      Parameters:
      path - filesystem path to a CRAM file (no existence check until first BamReader.toGenomicRun(java.lang.String) call).
      referenceFasta - filesystem path to the reference FASTA against which the CRAM was aligned. Required (Binding Decision §139); CRAM is reference-compressed and cannot be decoded without it. samtools auto-builds a .fai index alongside the FASTA on first use if one isn't present.

  • Method Details

    • referenceFasta

      public Path referenceFasta()
      Returns:
      the reference FASTA path passed at construction time.

    • buildSamtoolsViewCommand

      protected List<String> buildSamtoolsViewCommand(String region)
      Description copied from class: BamReader
      Build the samtools view -h ... command for this reader.

      Subclasses (CramReader in M88) override to inject --reference <fasta> so reference-compressed CRAM bytes can be reconstituted. Default implementation emits the bare BAM/SAM read invocation with an optional region filter.

      Overrides:
      buildSamtoolsViewCommand in class BamReader
      Parameters:
      region - optional region filter passed verbatim to samtools view ("chr1:1000-2000", "*", etc.); null means no filter.
      Returns:
      mutable list of command tokens (caller may further mutate before ProcessBuilder invocation).
